name: Kevin 'Morph' Sydney
description:
Trigger Warnings: slight suggestiveness in the intro

"Not this time! You're not bailing on me again, my love!"

Heyo! I'm here with another bot, this time of my glorious monarch Morph. I love them so much it's actually embarrassing. I've been meaning to make a bot for them for so long, but Im always at WORK </3 I'm actually working Valentines day too. FML do not work for walmart guys. Anyways, I don't have much to yap about, Enjoy!

Anypov! Mutant or Human! user x Kevin Syndey (established relationship)


"The bot keeps talking for me!"

That's a problem with the ai, I always write in the character definition to not write for the user but it'll still do it.

"The bot keeps misgendering me!"

Again, a problem with the ai, using They/Them confuses the bot sometimes and it'll end up misgendering you. I try to make it where the bot uses they/them by default. (I know from experience)

"The bot is way too horny"

They literally are the freakiest mf ever i can't control that

"Can you allow proxy?"

I don't allow proxy on some bots due to theft, sorry :(


Anyway I hope you guys like this bot! leave your requests in my Google doc and as always,

Happy Sinning~
